title: Luscious Monsoon French Chickpeas Rillettes
description: A floral and savory French dish featuring chickpeas, this rillettes is a vegetarian friendly treat that combines the freshness of monsoon season with the richness of cheese, all in a Dutch oven. This candy like dish is sure to delight your taste buds.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a Dutch oven, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the chickpeas, shredded cheese, heavy cream, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the Dutch oven from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Use an immersion blender to mash the chickpea mixture to a coarse consistency.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Garnish with edible flowers and serve warm.
